landing.badge: Launch your SaaS in days, not months
landing.title: The Complete SaaS Starter Kit
landing.description: Everything you need to build and launch your next SaaS product. Authentication, payments, subscriptions, and more -- all pre-configured and ready to deploy.
landing.featuresDescription: Built with modern technologies and best practices to help you ship faster.
landing.oneBackendDescription: Build your web app with Next.js and native mobile apps with Expo, all powered by the same Convex backend.
landing.builtForSaasDescription: Skip the boilerplate and focus on building your unique features.
landing.ctaDescription: Join developers who are shipping faster with our production-ready starter kit.
